issue_title: Unsubscribe link showing [object Object] message after opening window
issue_body_preview:
### Steps to reproduce

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/45569116/126732974-2475d23b-9749-4cc7-8a86-aeecf53c08d9.png)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/45569116/126732994-176fdd3f-fe83-487f-b69b-98db41d1ffed.png)

### Expected behavior

No error message is
test_description_zh: 打开一封包含退订（Unsubscribe）链接的邮件，点击退订链接，观察弹出窗口或页面中显示的提示信息内容。
expected_result_zh: 点击退订链接后，弹出窗口或页面应显示正常的退订提示文本，不应出现 [object Object] 的错误信息。
